raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> I was charged {$290.00} as a deposit for an event in XXXX at the end of XX/XX/year>. The event was canceled and rescheduled twice! I made flight arrangements only to have to cancel everything. I could not continue to reschedule an overseas event that requires extensive planning. I asked for my money back mutiple times. I was told I would get a refund but did not and then I never did and stopped responding. Then I charged it back with Barclays in XXXX and I have received zero updates.
